creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #12)
www/php80-opcache and www/php81-opcache should now be fixed with the merge of upstream commit https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/commit/027c16bef4b727095eea00bbef9266f1f4a78c27, in https://github.com/DimitryAndric/freebsd-src/commit/6dcdd0369f8bbd7d4e0c2822e8baf4cc258f27e9 .
